remaining_params.SpellDescription: Return target historic card from your graveyard to your hand. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target historic permanent in your graveyard

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.")
